title: Evangelion Q Survey results
wikitext:
[]: [SPOILERS] Evangelion Q Survey results             Quote Post by Xiel » Wed May 08, 2013 7:51 am Could someone translate this? http://www.evastore.jp/pc/201304q-sp3result.html

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Wed May 08, 2013 8:15 am >Which character scenes you enjoyed the most? 1. Kaworu 2. Asuka 3. Shinji 4. Misato 5. Mari 6. Other >Which Eva you'll like to pilot? 1. Eva 13 2. Wunder 3. Eva 08 4. Other Eva 5. Eva 02 6. All of them! 7. Mark 09 >Which new look from a 2.22 character shocked you the most? 1. Maya 2. Misato 3. Eva 01 4. Ritsuko 5. Gendo 6. Other >Favorite new character? 1. Sakura 2. Kohji 3. Hidaki 4. Midori 5. Tentative Name Rei Ayanami 6. Sumire 7. Other >With who you'll copilot an Eva? 1. Kaworu 2. Shinji 3. Asuka 4. Mari 5. Alone 6. Tentative Name Rei Ayanami 7. Another character

[]:             Quote Post by Giji Shinka » Wed May 08, 2013 8:24 am Mr. Tines wrote: >Which Eva you'll like to pilot? 2. Wunder

[]:             Quote Post by TheFriskyIan » Wed May 08, 2013 8:38 am Rei is a new character?

[]:             Quote Post by TruthfulLie » Wed May 08, 2013 8:39 am TheFriskyIan wrote: Rei is a new character?

[]:             Quote Post by AlphaGamma » Wed May 08, 2013 8:40 am Mr. Tines wrote: >Which character scenes you enjoyed the most? 1. Kaworu 2. Asuka 3. Shinji 4. Misato 5. Mari 6. Other >Favorite new character? 1. Sakura 2. Kohji 3. Hidaki 4. Midori 5. Tentative Name Rei Ayanami 6. Sumire 7. Other

[]:             Quote Post by Xiel » Wed May 08, 2013 8:48 am Thank you. Giji Shinka wrote: Wunder confirmed Eva? Yay?

[]:             Quote Post by Fireball » Wed May 08, 2013 8:49 am If with looks they mean personality, then yeah, otherwhise Maya didn't change much.

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Wed May 08, 2013 10:48 am Mr. Tines wrote: >Which new look from a 2.22 character shocked you the most? 1. Maya 2. Misato 3. Eva 01 4. Ritsuko 5. Gendo 6. Other

[]:             Quote Post by Xiel » Wed May 08, 2013 11:08 am ElMariachi wrote: EVA-01?! But the only thing we see from it is its eye? Did the fact its eye seems red now shocked people that much, or are they talking about the fact it is now the Wunder's master?

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Wed May 08, 2013 11:42 am Fireball wrote: If with looks they mean personality, then yeah, otherwhise Maya didn't change much.

[]:             Quote Post by riffraff11235 » Wed May 08, 2013 11:55 am FreakyFilmFan4ever wrote: Yeah. Her line about young men made my whole entire day, though.

[]:             Quote Post by Dima » Thu May 09, 2013 12:26 pm Mr. Tines wrote: >Which Eva you'll like to pilot? 1. Eva 13 2. Wunder 3. Eva 08 4. Other Eva 5. Eva 02 6. All of them! 7. Mark 09

[]:             Quote Post by airman4 » Thu May 09, 2013 12:31 pm Dima wrote: Surprised that Eva 02 ranked so low.I expected more since it had the most battles and a little ''redesign''

[]:             Quote Post by Bagheera » Thu May 09, 2013 12:37 pm Man, I can't make sense of this. Mari's in the gutter but her Eva ranks pretty high, Eva 13 is tops even though it wrecks the world, people want Shinji as their co-pilot even though he wrecks the world . . . weird stuff. Kaworu makes sense though, as he's always been popular and was talking sense throughout. But no love for Sumire, very sad.

[]:             Quote Post by Dima » Thu May 09, 2013 12:39 pm airman4 wrote: well , the final is between eva 13 and 08 awesome ending and music of mari xd That helped so much

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Thu May 09, 2013 12:39 pm Dima wrote: Surprised that Eva 02 ranked so low.I expected more since it had the most battles and a little ''redesign''

[]:             Quote Post by airman4 » Thu May 09, 2013 1:31 pm Dima wrote: I think the fact that Unit 08 is a brand new EVA helped a little(Unit 13 is new but looks like Unit 01).And maybe the colour They should have included Unit 08+02 too(i would vote it) but maybe they aren't so sure yet if it will be in 4.0

[]:             Quote Post by riffraff11235 » Thu May 09, 2013 1:59 pm airman4 wrote: Hahahahah! Yeah eva 02+08 could be a anno's joke.

[]:             Quote Post by Monk Ed » Thu May 09, 2013 2:51 pm riffraff11235 wrote: If Unit-08+02, aka FrankenEva, is in 4.0 and there isn't a scene with Misato/Asuka/Mari shouting the Japanese equivalent of "IT'S ALIVE!!!", I will be very much disappoint.
